structured_output.title: ISO 26262 evidence audit kick-off
key_topics: Safety goal review and ASIL classification
Part 4 and Part 6 evidence scope definition
Open action items from pre-audit checklist
recommended_agenda: 10 min — Introductions and project scope recap
20 min — Review of current evidence package status

structured_output.context_notes: ISO 26262 evidence audit kick-off for BMW iX3 project. Attendees represent the OEM safety team. Thomas Hofmann is the project safety manager. Part 4 (system level) and Part 6 (software level) are in scope. All materials are governed by the signed NDA.
action_items_from_last_meeting: Follow up on open ASIL classification items for the propulsion control unit
Send updated software safety plan draft by EOW
Confirm availability of hardware-software interface specification
